summary: The official Thomas Edison website homepage highlights his legacy as an inventor and entrepreneur. It emphasizes his core philosophies of relentless persistence and the necessity of hard work to capture opportunities, supported by two of his most famous quotes.

principles.statement: The most certain way to succeed is always to try just one more time.
principles.rationale: Giving up is our greatest weakness, so persistence is the ultimate key to overcoming failure.
principles.source_quote: Our greatest weakness lies in giving up. The most certain way to succeed is always to try just one more time.

principles.statement: Recognize that opportunity looks like hard work.
principles.rationale: Most people miss out on opportunities because they are disguised as labor and effort rather than easy wins.
principles.source_quote: Opportunity is missed by most people because it is dressed in overalls and looks like hard work.

heuristics: Always try just one more time when faced with failure.

signature_quotes.text: Opportunity is missed by most people because it is dressed in overalls and looks like hard work.
Our greatest weakness lies in giving up. The most certain way to succeed is always to try just one more time.

anti_patterns.description: Giving up when faced with obstacles or failure.
anti_patterns.why_it_fails: It is our 'greatest weakness' and guarantees failure, whereas trying one more time is the most certain path to success.
